title: Revealing the nature of the starburst galaxies in the $z=2.4$ overdensity HATLAS J0849
comment: 25 pages. 12 figures. Preprint. Submitted to MNRAS on March 18; under peer review. Constructive comments welcome
summary: Today's most massive ellipticals are proposed to originate from starbursting galaxies in $z\gtrsim2$ overdensities. To discern what triggers these starbursts, and their $z=0$ descendants, we performed a detailed case study of five gas-rich galaxies in the $z=2.41$ overdensity, HATLAS J084933.4+021443. Using 0.15" resolution CO(4-3), [C I] 1-0, and dust-continuum observations, we characterised their cold gas morphology and kinematics. We find two rotating discs, W and C, both exhibiting non-axisymmetric radial gas motions (consistent with bars). Of the two extreme starbursts, W is a lopsided, rotation-dominated disc with a rotation velocity of $\sim520$ km s$^{-1}$, whereas T is most likely a late-stage merger. Combined with recent studies, we find that $\gtrsim42\%$ of gas-rich, massive starbursts in overdensities are rotation-dominated discs, a fraction not yet systematically reproduced by galaxy evolution models. Beyond $z=1$, disc galaxies with rotation velocities of $>400$ km s$^{-1}$ reside almost exclusively in overdensities, consistent with early mass assembly in dense environments. By comparing to local early-type galaxies with cold gas discs, we confirm that these systems already reside in halos comparable to the most massive $z\sim0$ ellipticals at the centres of groups and clusters. Despite their extreme star-formation rates, these discs lie on the same $σ-$SFR locus as lower-SFR field galaxies, implying that stellar feedback remains the dominant turbulence driver. We postulate that this is because inflowing gas is effectively transported through ordered streaming, such that only a small fraction of kinetic energy feeds disc-wide turbulence.

AI.tldr: 研究发现在z=2.41超密度区域中，气体丰富的星暴星系中至少有42%是旋转主导的盘星系，这些星系已经处于与当今最大椭圆星系相当的质量环境中。
AI.motivation: 为了理解当今最大椭圆星系的起源，需要研究z≥2超密度区域中的星暴星系触发机制及其演化过程。
AI.method: 对z=2.41超密度区域HATLAS J084933.4+021443中的五个气体丰富星系进行高分辨率（0.15"）CO(4-3)、[C I] 1-0和尘埃连续谱观测，分析其冷气体形态和运动学特征。
AI.result: 发现两个旋转盘星系（W和C）都表现出非轴对称径向气体运动（与棒状结构一致）。W是旋转主导的盘星系，旋转速度约520 km/s，T很可能是晚期合并星系。超过42%的气体丰富星暴星系是旋转主导的盘星系，且旋转速度>400 km/s的盘星系几乎只存在于超密度区域。
AI.conclusion: 这些星系已经处于与当今最大椭圆星系相当的质量环境中，尽管星暴活动剧烈，但恒星反馈仍是主要的湍流驱动机制，流入气体通过有序流动有效传输，只有小部分动能转化为盘范围的湍流。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于z=2.41超密度区域中的星暴星系，利用高分辨率CO(4-3)、[C I]和尘埃连续谱观测研究冷气体形态与运动学，与用户对高红移星系动力学、多相气体及强引力透镜的兴趣高度吻合。论文作者中包含用户核心作者Jianhang Chen，且主题涉及星暴星系、冷气体、尘埃等用户高频关键词。论文方法（高分辨率干涉观测）和科学问题（星暴触发机制、盘星系旋转速度）与用户画像中的密集气体、大质量主序星系、宇宙正午等主题直接相关。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 当今最巨大的椭圆星系被认为起源于红移z≳2的超密度区域中的星暴星系。为了探究触发这些星暴的原因及其在z=0时的后裔，我们对位于z=2.41超密度区域HATLAS J084933.4+021443中的五个富气体星系进行了详细的案例研究。利用0.15角秒分辨率的CO(4-3)、[C I] 1-0和尘埃连续谱观测，我们表征了它们的冷气体形态和运动学。我们发现两个旋转盘，W和C，均表现出非轴对称的径向气体运动（与棒结构一致）。在两个极端星暴中，W是一个不对称的、旋转主导的盘，旋转速度约为520 km/s，而T则很可能是一个晚期并合体。结合近期研究，我们发现超密度区域中超过42%的富气体大质量星暴是旋转主导的盘，这一比例尚未被星系演化模型系统性地重现。在z>1之外，旋转速度超过400 km/s的盘状星系几乎只存在于超密度区域中，这与早期质量在密集环境中聚集的图景一致。通过与拥有冷气体盘的本地早型星系比较，我们确认这些系统已经处于与群和团中心最巨大的z~0椭圆星系相当的质量环境中。尽管其恒星形成率极高，这些盘却位于与低恒星形成率场星系相同的σ-SFR关系上，这意味着恒星反馈仍然是主要的湍流驱动机制。我们推测这是因为流入气体通过有序流动被有效传输，只有一小部分动能转化为盘范围的湍流。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，这些星系已经处于与当今最大椭圆星系相当的质量环境中，尽管星暴活动剧烈，但恒星反馈仍是主要的湍流驱动机制，流入气体通过有序流动有效传输，只有小部分动能转化为盘范围的湍流。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：HATLAS J084933.4+021443成员星系的属性

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: \(9\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}5\times 9\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}5\) cutout of HATLAS J084933.4+021443 comparing the HST/110W stellar emission (background colour map) vs ALMA/Band 4 dust-continuum emission (white contours, in steps of \(2^{n}\sigma\) , where \(n=2,3,4,5,...\) ). The five known member galaxies are labelled in white. The ALMA beam is shown in the bottom left of the image.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：\(9\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}5\times 9\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}5\) 的HATLAS J084933.4+021443局部图，比较HST/110W恒星辐射（背景色图）与ALMA/Band 4尘埃连续谱辐射（白色等高线，步长为\(2^{n}\sigma\)，其中\(n=2,3,4,5,...\)）。五个已知成员星系用白色标注。ALMA波束显示在图像左下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Columns (from left to right): unmasked CO(4–3) moment-0, [C i ] 1–0 moment-0, underlying dust-continuum emission maps, represented in terms of the signal-to-noise ratio (S/N). The moment-0 maps were made by imaging a single channel over 90% of the line emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：列（从左到右）：未掩蔽的CO(4–3)零阶矩、[C i] 1–0零阶矩、以及以信噪比（S/N）表示的底层尘埃连续谱发射图。零阶矩图是通过对覆盖线发射90%的单个通道成像得到的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Each row: CO(4–3) moment-0, 1, 2 maps, major-axis PVD, and minor-axis PVD for the galaxy labeled at left. For HyLIRGs-W and T, we show the CO(4–3) moment maps generated from the emission lines cubes with 4 \(\times\) the native resolution ( \(\sim 17\) km s -1 ), whereas for the ULIRGs, we show the moment maps generated from the cubes with 8 \(\times\) the native resolution ( \(\sim 35\) km s -1 ). The colormap in the left panel shows the moment-0 maps generated from the masked cubes, whereas the contours show the 1-channel-image moment-0 maps also shown in Fig. 2 , in steps of 3 \(\sigma\) (grey) and \(4n\sigma\) (black, where \(n=1,2,3...\) ). For consistency, we show the PVDs extracted along the axis shown in the left panels (black line, with centre marked), from the 8 \(\times\) native channel resolution cube, with contours at \(3n\sigma\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：每一行：左侧标注星系的CO(4–3)零阶矩、一阶矩、二阶矩图、主轴位置-速度图（PVD）和次轴PVD。对于HyLIRGs-W和T，我们展示了由本征分辨率（\(\sim 17\) km s^{-1}）的4倍通道立方体生成的CO(4–3)矩图；而对于ULIRGs，我们展示了由本征分辨率（\(\sim 35\) km s^{-1}）的8倍通道立方体生成的矩图。左面板的色图显示由掩蔽立方体生成的零阶矩图，而等高线显示图2中也展示的单通道图像零阶矩图，步长为3\(\sigma\)（灰色）和\(4n\sigma\)（黑色，其中\(n=1,2,3...\)）。为了一致性，我们展示了从8倍本征通道分辨率立方体中沿左面板所示轴（黑线，中心已标记）提取的PVD，等高线为\(3n\sigma\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: PV diagrams along the potential bar axis of HyLIRG-W (right) and perpendicular to it (left). The left-hand PV exhibits the X-shape typical of a barred galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：沿HyLIRG-W潜在棒轴（右）和垂直于该轴（左）的位置-速度图。左侧的PV图呈现出棒状星系典型的X形。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Best-fit kinematic model for the CO(4–3) emission of HyLIRG-W, imaged at \(\sim 35\) km s -1 . a) Moment-0, 1, and 2 maps (left), best-fit model (centre), and residual (right). b) Position-velocity diagrams for the CO(4–3) emission of HyLIRG-W, extracted along the major (top) and minor (bottom) kinematic axes. The data is shown by the red-blue colour map and the mask is outlined in transparent grey. Contours for the data and best-fit model are shown in red and black respectively, in levels of \(\pm 3n\sigma\) , with the rotation curve depicted by the overlaid black points. c) Best-fit (with error bars) and fixed parameters for the example model fit showing the 2nd iteration with the PA fixed to the mean of the initial fit. d) Comparison of the data and model for every second 35 km s -1 channel. The top panels in each row depict the data (red-blue colour map), whereas the bottom panels depict the best-fit model. Contours are shown in steps of \(3+2n\sigma\) (red lines, steps labelled at bottom), with the mask applied to the data outlined in the top panels (thick grey line).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HyLIRG-W的CO(4–3)发射在\(\sim 35\) km s^{-1}成像下的最佳拟合运动学模型。a) 零阶矩、一阶矩和二阶矩图（左）、最佳拟合模型（中）和残差（右）。b) HyLIRG-W的CO(4–3)发射沿主轴（上）和次轴（下）运动学轴提取的位置-速度图。数据由红蓝色图显示，掩模由透明灰色轮廓标出。数据和最佳拟合模型的等高线分别以红色和黑色显示，级别为\(\pm 3n\sigma\)，旋转曲线由叠加的黑色点表示。c) 示例模型拟合的最佳拟合（带误差棒）和固定参数，显示第二次迭代，其中PA固定为初始拟合的平均值。d) 每第二个35 km s^{-1}通道的数据与模型比较。每行的上面板显示数据（红蓝色图），下面板显示最佳拟合模型。等高线以\(3+2n\sigma\)的步长显示（红线，步长在底部标注），应用于数据的掩模在上面板中由粗灰线标出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Best-fit kinematic model for the CO(4–3) emission of ULIRG-C, imaged at \(\sim 35\) km s -1 . Each panel is the same as in Fig. 5
figures.caption_zh: 图6：ULIRG-C的CO(4–3)发射在\(\sim 35\) km s^{-1}成像下的最佳拟合运动学模型。每个面板与图5相同。

figures.caption_zh: 表2：使用3D Barolo拟合的运动学属性

title: Estimation of the magnetic field strength from ALMA dust polarization in the protocluster G327.29
summary: Magnetic fields and turbulence may play a crucial role in the evolution of molecular clouds and ultimately in the formation of dense cores and stars. Despite being studied in many molecular clouds, the exact role of magnetic fields and turbulence in star formation is still poorly understood. Here, we report the high resolution plane of sky magnetic field (B_pos) morphology toward the high mass star forming region G327.29, obtained with the 12-meter of the Atacama Large Millimeter/sub-millimeter Array (ALMA) telescope. From our analysis, we obtain a complex B_pos morphology where the magnetic field orientation is uniformly distributed across the entire range from -90 to +90 deg. The observed area is composed of one filament and one dense central clump, which harbor multiple dense cores. The total magnetic field strengths (B_tot) in these regions are 1.4 \pm 0.7 mG and 2.0 \pm 0.8 mG at a number density (n) of 6.8 \pm 1.5 x 10^5 and 1.1 \pm 0.3 x 10^6 cm^-3 , derived from the angular dispersion function (ADF) method. The virial parameters (α vir )in these regions are 7.7 \pm 7.1 and 0.7 \pm 0.6, suggesting that the regions may be gravitationally bound or unbound after accounting for the errors. Moreover, the ratio of turbulent to magnetic energy (~ 0.25) indicates that the magnetic field is dynamically more important than turbulence. The relative influence of turbulence and magnetic fields on core dynamics appears to depend on how the B_tot scales with gas density (\r{ho}) in the densest regions. In summary, this work presents a comprehensive analysis of the relative roles of magnetic fields, turbulence, and gravity in regulating high-mass star formation in G327.29, enabled by high-resolution ALMA observations.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA高分辨率观测G327.29大质量恒星形成区的磁场形态，发现磁场比湍流对恒星形成过程更具动力学重要性
AI.motivation: 磁场和湍流在分子云演化和恒星形成中起关键作用，但其具体作用机制仍不清楚。研究旨在通过高分辨率观测理解磁场、湍流和重力在大质量恒星形成中的相对重要性
AI.method: 使用ALMA 12米望远镜对G327.29区域进行高分辨率平面天空磁场观测，采用角弥散函数方法计算总磁场强度，分析磁场形态、湍流与磁场能量比以及维里参数
AI.result: 观测到复杂的磁场形态，磁场方向在-90到+90度范围内均匀分布；在密度6.8×10^5 cm^-3和1.1×10^6 cm^-3区域测得总磁场强度分别为1.4±0.7 mG和2.0±0.8 mG；湍流与磁场能量比约0.25，表明磁场比湍流更具动力学重要性；维里参数显示区域可能受重力束缚或未束缚
AI.conclusion: 磁场在大质量恒星形成区G327.29中比湍流更具动力学重要性，湍流和磁场对核心动力学的相对影响取决于总磁场强度随气体密度的变化关系

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究银河系内大质量恒星形成区G327.29的磁场，属于恒星形成和分子云物理范畴。用户的核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等，与本文的银河系内磁场研究几乎没有交集。虽然论文涉及ALMA、尘埃、分子等关键词，但这些属于宽泛的领域重叠，不足以构成高相关性。用户明确要求不降级强透镜论文，但本文与强透镜无关。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。用户主要关注强引力透镜、高红移星系（宇宙正午）、尘埃、致密气体等，而本文研究银河系内大质量恒星形成区的磁场，属于恒星形成和星际介质物理，与用户的核心主题不匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。用户常用方法包括引力透镜建模、高分辨率光谱（如JWST、ALMA）研究星系动力学，而本文使用ALMA尘埃极化观测和角弥散函数方法测量磁场强度，方法上无直接关联。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者列表中无用户核心作者（如daizhong liu、jianhang chen、reinhard genzel等）。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。本文的ALMA高分辨率磁场测量在恒星形成领域有一定新颖性，但与用户关注的高红移星系动力学、透镜研究等方向无关。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题（银河系内恒星形成区磁场）与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）严重偏离，且无作者重叠。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场和湍流可能在分子云的演化以及最终致密核和恒星的形成中发挥关键作用。尽管在许多分子云中进行了研究，但磁场和湍流在恒星形成中的确切作用仍知之甚少。在此，我们报告了利用阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）12米望远镜获得的高分辨率天平面磁场（B_pos）形态，朝向高质量恒星形成区G327.29。通过分析，我们得到了复杂的B_pos形态，其中磁场方向在-90到+90度的整个范围内均匀分布。观测区域由一个纤维结构和致密中心团块组成，其中包含多个致密核。这些区域的总磁场强度（B_tot）分别为1.4 \pm 0.7 mG和2.0 \pm 0.8 mG，对应的数密度（n）分别为6.8 \pm 1.5 x 10^5 cm^-3和1.1 \pm 0.3 x 10^6 cm^-3，这是通过角弥散函数（ADF）方法推导得出的。这些区域的维里参数（α_vir）分别为7.7 \pm 7.1和0.7 \pm 0.6，表明在考虑误差后，这些区域可能是引力束缚或非束缚的。此外，湍流与磁能之比（约0.25）表明磁场在动力学上比湍流更重要。湍流和磁场对核心动力学的相对影响似乎取决于B_tot在最致密区域如何随气体密度（\r{ho}）变化。总之，本研究通过高分辨率ALMA观测，对G327.29中磁场、湍流和引力在调控高质量恒星形成中的相对作用进行了全面分析。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，AI结论为：磁场在大质量恒星形成区G327.29中比湍流更具动力学重要性，湍流和磁场对核心动力学的相对影响取决于总磁场强度随气体密度的变化关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: The color image presents the Spitzer (GLIMPSE) 8 \(\mu\) m emission toward the G327.29 star-forming region (Benjamin et al. 2003 ) . The contours represent the ATLASGAL 870 \(\mu\) m emission obtained from Schuller et al. ( 2009 ) . Contour levels range from 0.45 to 34 Jy beam -1 respectively with a 19.2 ′′ beam. Middle: Map of the 1.2 mm continuum emission toward the central clump (protocluster) from the ALMA-IMF large program (Motte et al. 2022 ) . The two blue dashed circles mark the areas observed for polarization with the ALMA 12m array. Right: 1.2 mm continuum emission map obtained in this work by mosaicking the two pointings shown in the middle panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：彩色图像展示了朝向G327.29恒星形成区的斯皮策（GLIMPSE）8 \(\mu\) m发射（Benjamin et al. 2003）。等高线表示来自Schuller等人（2009）的ATLASGAL 870 \(\mu\) m发射。等高线水平范围分别为0.45至34 Jy beam^{-1}，波束为19.2 ′′。中图：来自ALMA-IMF大型计划（Motte et al. 2022）的朝向中心团块（原星团）的1.2 mm连续谱发射图。两个蓝色虚线圆圈标记了用ALMA 12米阵列观测偏振的区域。右图：通过拼接中图所示的两个指向在本工作中获得的1.2 mm连续谱发射图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Dust temperature ( \(T_{\text{d}}\) ) map in the G327.29 region obtained from the work of Dell’Ova et al. ( 2024 ) . We masked the regions where no 1.2 mm continuum emission was observed in our analysis. Region 1 and Region 2 are two distinct areas where we estimate the magnetic field separately.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Dell’Ova等人（2024）工作获得的G327.29区域的尘埃温度（\(T_{\text{d}}\)）图。我们遮蔽了在分析中未观测到1.2 mm连续谱发射的区域。区域1和区域2是我们分别估计磁场的两个不同区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of the number of components of the HN 13 C (J=3 \(-\) 2) and H 13 CO + (J=3 \(-\) 2) lines.

Figure 4: Velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma_{\text{tot}}\) ) maps of HN 13 C (3 \(-\) 2) and H 13 CO + (3 \(-\) 2) lines obtained from the pixel-wise fitting using Gausspy+ module. Region 1 and Region 2 are analyzed independently to estimate the magnetic field.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用Gausspy+模块通过逐像素拟合获得的HN^{13}C（3 \(-\) 2）和H^{13}CO^{+}（3 \(-\) 2）谱线的速度弥散（\(\sigma_{\text{tot}}\)）图。区域1和区域2被独立分析以估计磁场。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Upper Left: Observed filament in the Region 1 . The black solid line is the ridgeline of the filament. Upper Right: Same filament after straightening the ridgeline vertically. Due to certain jumps in the middle of the ridge line, those rows were masked. Here the length of the filament is denoted by symbol L which is equal to \(\sim\) 0.20 pc. Lower: Radial profile of the integrated intensity (I) of the filament. Here the solid lightskyblue and red lines are the mean and dispersion ( \(\sigma\) ) values at each concentric cylindrical shell. We set the radius (R) at \(\sim\) 0.03 pc, because beyond that I decreases sharply and returns to flat. This is indicated by the blue dashed vertical line. This phenomenon is caused because of the mass distribution not being symmetrical on both sides of the ridgeline of the filament.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左上：在区域1中观测到的纤维结构。黑色实线是纤维的脊线。右上：将脊线垂直拉直后的同一纤维。由于脊线中间存在某些跳跃，这些行被遮蔽。此处纤维的长度用符号L表示，等于\(\sim\) 0.20 pc。下图：纤维积分强度（I）的径向轮廓。此处浅天蓝色和红色实线是每个同心圆柱壳上的平均值和弥散（\(\sigma\)）值。我们将半径（R）设为\(\sim\) 0.03 pc，因为超过该值后I急剧下降并恢复平坦。这由蓝色虚线垂直线指示。这种现象是由于质量分布在纤维脊线两侧不对称造成的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: 1.2 mm dust continuum map. Red line segments (arbitrary length) representing the magnetic field orientation are plotted for regions above the 3 \(\sigma\) level, where \(\sigma\) (rms) = 0.023 mJy beam -1 (polarization vector rotate by 90 ∘ ). Contours represent the dust continuum emission at levels of 4, 10, 20, 40, 66, 100, 130, 160, and 320 times the rms noise, \(\sigma\) (rms) = \(0.23\penalty 10000\ \text{mJy beam}^{-1}\) . Region 1 and Region 2 denote the subregions where we have calculated the magnetic field separately.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：1.2 mm尘埃连续谱图。红色线段（任意长度）表示磁场方向，绘制在高于3 \(\sigma\)水平的区域，其中\(\sigma\)（rms）= 0.023 mJy beam^{-1}（偏振矢量旋转90°）。等高线表示尘埃连续谱发射，水平为rms噪声的4、10、20、40、66、100、130、160和320倍，\(\sigma\)（rms）= \(0.23\penalty 10000\ \text{mJy beam}^{-1}\)。区域1和区域2表示我们分别计算磁场的子区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: ADFs for Region 1 (left) and Region 2 (right). The diamond symbols denote the observed data points. The blue solid line represents the best-fit model, while the cyan dashed line denotes the large-scale component of the fit. Black vertical dashed line denotes the observed beam.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：区域1（左）和区域2（右）的ADF。菱形符号表示观测数据点。蓝色实线表示最佳拟合模型，而青色虚线表示拟合的大尺度分量。黑色垂直虚线表示观测波束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Correlation between magnetic field ( \(B_{\text{tot}}\) ) and number density ( \(n_{\text{H}}\) ) obtained from the work of Crutcher et al. ( 2010 ) . Here the blue dot points and the grey lines are measured line-of-sight magnetic fields ( \(B_{\text{los}}\) ) and the corresponding errors (1 \(\sigma\) ) obtained from Zeeman splitting measurements. A power law index ( \(\alpha\) ) of 0.65 is obtained from the observed data using Bayesian statistics beyond a \(n_{\text{H}}\) of 300 cm -3 from the work of Crutcher et al. ( 2010 ) and 0.50 beyond a \(n_{\text{H}}\) of 2600 cm -3 from the work of Whitworth et al. ( 2025 ) . Here, the magenta asterisk are \(B_{\text{tot}}\) (after statistical correction) obtained from our work and the red dots are \(B_{\text{tot}}\) from the earlier MagMar survey (Cortés et al. 2021 ; Sanhueza et al. 2021 ; Zapata et al. 2024 ; Saha et al. 2024 ; Sanhueza et al. 2025 ; Hwang et al. 2026 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：来自Crutcher等人（2010）工作获得的磁场（\(B_{\text{tot}}\)）与数密度（\(n_{\text{H}}\)）之间的相关性。此处蓝色点状和灰色线是从塞曼分裂测量中获得的视线方向磁场（\(B_{\text{los}}\)）及相应的误差（1 \(\sigma\)）。根据Crutcher等人（2010）的工作，在\(n_{\text{H}}\)超过300 cm^{-3}时，使用贝叶斯统计从观测数据获得幂律指数（\(\alpha\)）为0.65；根据Whitworth等人（2025）的工作，在\(n_{\text{H}}\)超过2600 cm^{-3}时，指数为0.50。此处，品红色星号是我们工作中获得的\(B_{\text{tot}}\)（经统计校正后），红色圆点是早期MagMar巡天（Cortés et al. 2021；Sanhueza et al. 2021；Zapata et al. 2024；Saha et al. 2024；Sanhueza et al. 2025；Hwang et al. 2026）中的\(B_{\text{tot}}\)。

title: The shortest detected intra-day variability of active galactic nuclei in TESS survey
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in A&A
summary: AGNs are known to be variable in almost all wavelengths and timescales. The shortest variability timescale of AGNs can be used to probe the smallest scale structures within AGNs. We aim to measure the shortest detected variability timescale, $t_{min,ul}$, of type 1 radio-quiet Seyfert galaxies and analyse their characteristics. We extracted TESS light curves of 47 Seyfert 1 galaxies. We measured the PSDs of the sample, modelled by a power law model plus a constant noise, and constrained the shortest detected AGN variability timescale as the power law component exceeds the constant noise and systematic uncertainties indicated by the upper limits of non-variable quiescent galaxies' PSDs. We measured the upper limits of the shortest variability timescale to be $\log(t_{min,ul}/hrs)=0.85\pm0.55$. We compared these upper limits to a range of theoretical AGN variability timescales, and the natural interpretation of our measured $t_{min,ul}$ is the light crossing scale from a coherently varying region, where the measured $t_{min,ul}$ corresponds to the range from a few to thousands of gravitational radii. A significant fraction of these light crossing scales is smaller than the accretion disk emission sizes measured by quasar microlensing, reverberation mapping, or theoretical accretion disk models. Since we only measure the upper limits, the true physical shortest variability timescales are even shorter. We measure the power law index to be $2.0\pm0.2$, and find weak anticorrelations with the black hole mass and luminosity. Our analysis suggests that the shortest optical variability is driven by a compact region smaller than the accretion disk size, potentially by X-ray reprocessing. Alternatively, this shortest timescale variability suggests that the accretion disk can be inhomogeneous potentially caused by turbulence from magnetorotational instability or magnetic reconnections. (abridged)

AI.tldr: 该研究测量了47个Seyfert 1星系的最短光学变光时标上限，发现这些时标对应从几个到数千个引力半径的光穿越尺度，可能小于吸积盘尺寸，暗示变光可能由X射线再处理或吸积盘不均匀性驱动。
AI.motivation: AGN在几乎所有波段和时间尺度上都具有变光特性，最短的变光时标可用于探测AGN内部最小尺度结构。研究旨在测量I型射电宁静Seyfert星系的最短检测变光时标，并分析其特征。
AI.method: 提取47个Seyfert 1星系的TESS光变曲线，测量其功率谱密度(PSD)，用幂律模型加常数噪声建模，当幂律分量超过常数噪声和非变光静止星系的PSD上限指示的系统不确定性时，约束最短检测AGN变光时标。
AI.result: 测得最短变光时标上限为log(t_min,ul/hrs)=0.85±0.55，幂律指数为2.0±0.2。这些时标对应从几个到数千个引力半径的光穿越尺度，显著部分小于通过微引力透镜、反响映射或理论吸积盘模型测量的吸积盘发射尺寸。发现与黑洞质量和光度存在弱反相关。
AI.conclusion: 最短光学变光可能由小于吸积盘尺寸的致密区域驱动，可能是X射线再处理过程。或者，这种最短时标变光表明吸积盘可能不均匀，可能由磁旋转不稳定性或磁重联引起的湍流造成。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究Seyfert 1星系的最短光学变光时标，属于AGN变光性研究，与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、高红移星系运动学、高红移偏振、高红移多相气体）无直接关联。论文未涉及引力透镜、高红移星系或用户核心作者。虽然关键词'magnetic'有微弱匹配，但整体主题和方法与用户兴趣画像的重叠度极低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 低。论文主题为AGN变光性，用户兴趣集中在强引力透镜和高红移星系研究，两者无直接关联。
recommendation.method_fit: 低。论文使用TESS光变曲线和PSD分析，用户常用方法为引力透镜建模、高分辨率光谱和成像。
recommendation.author_fit: 无。论文作者不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 低。论文创新点在于测量最短变光时标，但该方向并非用户关注的核心科学问题。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户主要兴趣领域（强引力透镜、高红移星系）不匹配，且无核心作者参与。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 活动星系核（AGN）已知在几乎所有波长和时间尺度上都会变化。AGN的最短变化时标可用于探测AGN内部的最小尺度结构。我们旨在测量1型射电宁静赛弗特星系的最短可探测变化时标$t_{min,ul}$，并分析其特征。我们提取了47个赛弗特1星系的TESS光变曲线。测量了样本的功率谱密度（PSD），采用幂律模型加常数噪声进行拟合，并将最短可探测AGN变化时标约束为幂律分量超过常数噪声和由非变宁静星系PSD上限指示的系统不确定性的时刻。测得最短变化时标的上限为$\log(t_{min,ul}/hrs)=0.85\pm0.55$。我们将这些上限与一系列理论AGN变化时标进行比较，所测$t_{min,ul}$的自然解释是来自相干变化区域的光穿越尺度，其中测得的$t_{min,ul}$对应从几个到数千个引力半径的范围。这些光穿越尺度中有相当一部分小于通过类星体微引力透镜、反响映射或理论吸积盘模型测得的吸积盘发射尺寸。由于我们仅测量上限，真实的物理最短变化时标甚至更短。测得幂律指数为$2.0\pm0.2$，并发现其与黑洞质量和光度存在弱反相关。我们的分析表明，最短光学变化是由小于吸积盘尺寸的致密区域驱动的，可能是X射线再处理过程。或者，这种最短时标变化表明吸积盘可能不均匀，可能由磁旋转不稳定性或磁重联引起的湍流造成。（删节版）
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：最短光学变光可能由小于吸积盘尺寸的致密区域驱动，可能是X射线再处理过程。或者，这种最短时标变光表明吸积盘可能不均匀，可能由磁旋转不稳定性或磁重联引起的湍流造成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Left: The systematics of TESS survey and light curve extraction technique indicated by the PSDs of non-variable galaxy light curves, where the y-axis is the scaled power relative to the constant white noise. Each gray line indicates the power law plus white noise fit for an individual galaxy’s light curve, the black line represents the mean galaxy PSD, and the red and yellow shaded areas represent the 1-sigma and 3-sigma limits, respectively. Right: Comparison between Seyfert 1 AGN, ESO 362-G018, Sector 5 PSD, which has the measured \(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\) value equal to the median of the AGN sample, and the upper limits of galaxies as a representative to illustrate the measurement of the shortest detected variability time scale. The text next to the PSD lists the parameters for the best fit. PSDs in both panels are normalized by their respective noise levels.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：非变星系光变曲线的PSD所指示的TESS巡天系统误差和光变曲线提取技术，其中y轴是相对于恒定白噪声的标度功率。每条灰线表示单个星系光变曲线的幂律加白噪声拟合，黑线表示平均星系PSD，红色和黄色阴影区域分别表示1-sigma和3-sigma界限。右图：赛弗特1型AGN ESO 362-G018第5扇区PSD（其测得的\(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\)值等于AGN样本的中位数）与星系上限的比较，作为说明最短可探测变化时标测量的代表。PSD旁边的文本列出了最佳拟合参数。两个面板中的PSD均按其各自的噪声水平进行了归一化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Left: The distribution of quiescent galaxies’ structure functions, normalized by the noise level, similar to Figure 1 left. Right: Comparison of structure functions of galaxies and NGC 931 sector 18 to demonstrate the smallest variability timescale measurement.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：宁静星系结构函数的分布，按噪声水平归一化，类似于图1左图。右图：星系与NGC 931第18扇区结构函数的比较，以展示最小变化时标的测量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Left: Distribution of the shortest detected TESS variability timescales of the sample. Right: Histogram showing the distribution of \(ct_{\textrm{min,ul}}\) in terms of \(r_{g}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：样本最短可探测TESS变化时标的分布。右图：以\(r_{g}\)为单位的\(ct_{\textrm{min,ul}}\)分布的直方图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Distribution of the shortest detected TESS variability timescales of the sample, plotted against the black hole mass. The blue dashed lines indicate the different values of gravitational radii for the given black hole mass, and the green and red solid lines indicate the theoretical and measured accretion disk and corona sizes from literature (Shakura and Sunyaev, 1973 ; Morgan et al. , 2010 ; Dogruel et al. , 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：样本最短可探测TESS变化时标的分布，与黑洞质量的关系图。蓝色虚线表示给定黑洞质量下引力半径的不同值，绿色和红色实线表示文献中理论和实测的吸积盘及冕的大小（Shakura and Sunyaev, 1973；Morgan et al., 2010；Dogruel et al., 2020）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Top left: Distribution of the power law indices for the PSD power law fit. Black hole mass (top right), \(L_{V}/L_{\textrm{Edd}}\) (bottom left), and V-band luminosity (bottom right) plotted against the power law index.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左上：PSD幂律拟合的幂律指数分布。黑洞质量（右上）、\(L_{V}/L_{\textrm{Edd}}\)（左下）和V波段光度（右下）与幂律指数的关系图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Left: Same as Figure 4 , but with \(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\) measured from structure functions. Right: Comparison between \(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\) measured in the observed frame from PSDs and structure functions. The red dashed line represents the one-to-one relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左图：与图4相同，但\(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\)由结构函数测得。右图：从PSD和结构函数测得的观测系\(t_{\textrm{min,ul}}\)的比较。红色虚线表示一对一关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Left: The PSD of an actual TESS light curve (NGC 3783 sector 36). The blue dashed line indicates the shortest detected variability timescale. Right: The PSD of a simulated light curve with \(\alpha=1.8\) and \(\nu_{\textrm{c}}=1.5\) day -1 . The blue dashed line indicates \(\nu_{\textrm{c}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：实际TESS光变曲线（NGC 3783第36扇区）的PSD。蓝色虚线表示最短可探测变化时标。右图：模拟光变曲线的PSD，参数为\(\alpha=1.8\)和\(\nu_{\textrm{c}}=1.5\)天\(^{-1}\)。蓝色虚线表示\(\nu_{\textrm{c}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : The distributions of \(\Delta\chi^{2}/\chi^{2}\) between simple power law model and the discontinuous power law model fits for original data (left) and the simulated data (right).
figures.caption_zh: 图8：原始数据（左图）和模拟数据（右图）的简单幂律模型与不连续幂律模型拟合之间\(\Delta\chi^{2}/\chi^{2}\)的分布。
